personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Senior Back End Engineer | Node.js, Next.js API & PHP
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Backend specialist focused on API design, database optimization, and high-availability systems. Extensive experience with Node.js, Next.js API Routes, PHP (Laravel), and PostgreSQL. Proven ability to architect secure multi-tenant SaaS environments, implement complex fintech integrations (Stripe Connect), and orchestrate Composite AI failover systems for sub-second inference.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Free access to the EU job market.

experience.title: Back End Software Engineer
responsibilities: Database Optimization: Architected a high-throughput API layer for ZIRO.FIT, optimizing complex data retrieval via PostgreSQL `json_build_object` and `LATERAL JOINs`, reducing database query volume by 80%.

AI Infrastructure: Engineered a Composite AI Service Layer orchestrating Gemini, Groq, and Cerebras APIs with exponential backoff and automated failover, guaranteeing 99.9% uptime against rate limits.
Security & Fintech: Designed a secure multi-tenant architecture featuring application-layer AES-256-GCM encryption and implemented complex multi-tier billing and payouts via Stripe Connect.
Algorithm Design: Developed proprietary scheduling algorithms, including an enhanced SM-2 Spaced Repetition System (SRS) using Prisma transactions.

experience.title: Back End Web Developer
responsibilities: Enterprise Architecture: Architected and launched production-ready backend systems utilizing Laravel and Symfony, while actively maintaining and extending complex legacy enterprise applications.
API Performance: Optimized Laravel backend services by implementing strategic Redis caching layers and refactoring legacy MySQL queries, decreasing server load and API latency by 30%.
Payment Systems: Built and maintained complex Stripe webhook handlers ensuring robust synchronization of user subscriptions and account states.
Feature Implementation: Designed and integrated scalable REST APIs and background processing jobs to support high-traffic business operations and new product rollouts.

projects.name: Lexity: Composite AI Backend
projects.description: Engineered the core backend featuring automated failovers between 3 LLM providers, Redis caching, and server-side encryption (AES-256) for all user data.
projects.stack: Node.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis, AES-256, Sentry

projects.name: ZIRO.FIT: Scalable Fintech & API Layer
projects.description: Architected a dual-sided marketplace routing complex Stripe Connect payouts, utilizing raw SQL optimization to collapse N+1 queries into single payloads.
projects.stack: Next.js APIs, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Stripe Connect, Vercel KV

projects.name: Interly: Adaptive State Engine
projects.description: Built a custom Spaced Repetition logic API handling thousands of scheduling permutations, driven by server-side evaluation via Google Gemini.
projects.stack: Next.js API Routes, Supabase Auth, Prisma, Serverless
